form.success_body: A Rempart technician will get back to you shortly to set up a visit. For anything urgent, call us at 450 555-0199.
form.error_title: Your message did not go through.
form.error_body: Please try again in a moment, or call us directly at 450 555-0199. We really do want to hear from you.
form.privacy_note: Your information stays with us and is only used to reply to your request.

pages.services_lead: Residential and commercial, handled by certified technicians with products safe for family and pets.
pages.villes_lead: We work across the North Shore of Montreal and Laval. Find your city and see how we can help, often the same day.
pages.faq_lead: Price, timing, safety for your family and pets, the guarantee. We answer straight.
pages.contact_lead: Phone, email or the form, whichever you prefer. We answer fast.
pages.about_lead: A neighbourhood company, born on the North Shore, that still answers its own phone.
pages.blog_lead: Clear advice to keep your home healthy: prevention, signs to watch for, and the right reflexes before you call.

footer.tagline: Residential and commercial pest control, rooted on Montreal's North Shore.

home.title: Rempart Extermination, residential pest control on the North Shore
